title: Glowy Players Renewed
description: Makes players glow so they can see each other.
body:
# Glowy-Players-Renewed
Makes players glow so they can see each other.

This mod is [Glowy Players](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/glowy-players) Renewed mod.

![screenshot_01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2e8c6aa0bbec4256a1259212ec5d1fb5ba260c2.png)
